A little love note

Happy birthday to my favorite person! I'm so lucky to have you as my best friend — thank you for every laugh, every late-night talk, and every memory we've made together. Here's to another year of chaos, adventures, and inside jokes only we understand. I love you so much. Enjoy your day, you deserve the world! 🎂💕
